Why it matters: Schema helps clarify page entity, breadcrumb, and page purpose

Issue: Investor blog meta descriptions too long or truncation-prone
Evidence: org-lot-map-buyers-guide and rv-lot-retirement-investment descriptions parse long; some shell extraction showed truncation around apostrophes
Why it matters: Long descriptions may be rewritten or clipped in search results
Fix: Rewrite descriptions to roughly 145-160 characters and avoid overlong punctuation-heavy phrasing

Issue: Rental listing trust copy can be stronger
Evidence: Rentals page distinguishes platforms, but owner-managed/listing freshness transparency can be more explicit

Evidence: Guidelines call out footer opportunities; footer currently covers core pages but not all investor articles from every page

Issue: Image performance opportunity on large listing images
Evidence: New covers return 394KB-642KB; acceptable but not aggressively optimized
Why it matters: Smaller responsive images improve page speed and mobile UX

Fix: Leave noindex; optional canonical to itself for cleanliness
